[index.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/25887886/index.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
  <title>Dylan Paul ✦</title>
  <style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:ital,wght@0,300;0,600;1,300;1,600&family=Nunito:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap');

:root {
  --mint: #a8eddc;
  --peach: #ffd6c0;
  --lavender: #d4c8f5;
  --sky: #b8e4f9;
  --yellow: #ffeaa0;
  --pink: #ffc8d8;
  --teal: #2ec4b6;
  --teal-dark: #1a9e94;
  --text: #1a2e2b;
  --muted: #6b8f8a;
  --white: #ffffff;
  --bg: #f7fffe;
  --card-bg: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
  --radius-lg: 28px;
  --radius-xl: 40px;
  --radius-pill: 999px;
}

*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

body {
  font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
  background: var(--bg);
  color: var(--text);
  overflow-x: hidden;
  cursor: none;
}

/* Custom cursor */
.cursor {
  width: 14px; height: 14px;
  background: var(--teal);
  border-radius: 50%;
  position: fixed;
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 9999;
  transition: transform 0.15s ease, background 0.2s;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
}
.cursor-ring {
  width: 38px; height: 38px;
  border: 2px solid var(--teal);
  border-radius: 50%;
  position: fixed;
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 9998;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  transition: all 0.1s ease;
  opacity: 0.5;
}

/* Blobs */
.blob {
  position: fixed;
  border-radius: 50%;
  filter: blur(80px);
  opacity: 0.35;
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 0;
  animation: blobFloat 12s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
}
.blob-1 { width: 500px; height: 500px; background: var(--mint); top: -100px; left: -150px; animation-delay: 0s; }
.blob-2 { width: 400px; height: 400px; background: var(--peach); top: 30%; right: -100px; animation-delay: -4s; }
.blob-3 { width: 350px; height: 350px; background: var(--lavender); bottom: 10%; left: 20%; animation-delay: -8s; }

@keyframes blobFloat {
  0% { transform: translate(0,0) scale(1); }
  100% { transform: translate(30px, 40px) scale(1.08); }
}

/* NAV */
nav {
  position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  z-index: 100;
  padding: 1.1rem 2rem;
  display: flex; justify-content: center;
}

.nav-pill {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
  backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
  border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
  padding: 0.6rem 2rem;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2.5rem;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 30px rgba(46,196,182,0.1);
}

.nav-logo {
  font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  color: var(--teal);
  font-weight: 600;
}

.nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; }
.nav-links a {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--muted);
  text-decoration: none;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  transition: color 0.2s;
  position: relative;
}
.nav-links a:hover { color: var(--teal); }

/* HERO */
#hero {
  min-height: 100vh;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  position: relative;
  padding: 8rem 2rem 4rem;
  z-index: 1;
}

.hero-wrap {
  max-width: 1100px; width: 100%;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5rem;
}

.hero-left { flex: 1; }

.hero-tag {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
  background: var(--mint);
  color: var(--teal-dark);
  font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
  border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.hero-name {
  font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
  font-size: clamp(3.5rem, 8vw, 6.5rem);
  line-height: 0.95;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text);
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}
.hero-name em {
  font-style: italic;
  color: var(--teal);
  display: block;
}

.hero-desc {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  line-height: 1.75;
  max-width: 460px;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.hero-chips {
  display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.6rem;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
}
.chip {
  padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
  border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  border: 2px solid transparent;
}
.chip-mint  { background: var(--mint);     color: #1a6b60; }
.chip-peach { background: var(--peach);    color: #7a4030; }
.chip-lav   { background: var(--lavender); color: #4a3a7a; }
.chip-sky   { background: var(--sky);      color: #1a4a6a; }

.hero-btn {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem;
  background: var(--teal);
  color: white;
  padding: 0.9rem 2rem;
  border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
  font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 800;
  text-decoration: none;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(46,196,182,0.35);
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
}
.hero-btn:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 14px 40px rgba(46,196,182,0.45);
}
.hero-btn span { font-size: 1.1rem; }

/* Hero photo */
.hero-right {
  position: relative;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.photo-frame {
  position: relative;
  width: 300px; height: 300px;
}

.photo-blob {
  position: absolute;
  inset: -16px;
  background: conic-gradient(var(--mint), var(--sky), var(--lavender), var(--peach), var(--mint));
  border-radius: 60% 40% 55% 45% / 45% 55% 40% 60%;
  animation: morphBlob 7s ease-in-out infinite;
  z-index: 0;
}

@keyframes morphBlob {
  0%,100% { border-radius: 60% 40% 55% 45% / 45% 55% 40% 60%; }
  33%     { border-radius: 40% 60% 45% 55% / 55% 45% 60% 40%; }
  66%     { border-radius: 55% 45% 60% 40% / 40% 60% 45% 55%; }
}

.photo-img {
  width: 300px; height: 300px;
  object-fit: cover; object-position: top center;
  border-radius: 60% 40% 55% 45% / 45% 55% 40% 60%;
  animation: morphBlob 7s ease-in-out infinite;
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
  border: 5px solid white;
  box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(46,196,182,0.2);
}

.photo-badge {
  position: absolute;
  background: white;
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  padding: 0.6rem 1rem;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
  font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.82rem;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem;
  z-index: 2;
  animation: badgeFloat 3s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
}
.badge-1 { bottom: 10px; left: -40px; animation-delay: 0s; }
.badge-2 { top: 20px; right: -40px; animation-delay: -1.5s; }

@keyframes badgeFloat {
  from { transform: translateY(0); }
  to   { transform: translateY(-8px); }
}

/* SECTIONS shared */
section { padding: 6rem 0; position: relative; z-index: 1; }
.container { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; }

.section-eyebrow {
  font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 800;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  color: var(--teal);
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
}
.section-eyebrow::before {
  content: ''; display: block;
  width: 24px; height: 2px;
  background: var(--teal); border-radius: 2px;
}

.section-heading {
  font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem);
  font-weight: 600; color: var(--text);
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
  line-height: 1.15;
}
.section-heading em { font-style: italic; color: var(--teal); }

/* Reveal */
.reveal {
  opacity: 0; transform: translateY(32px);
  transition: opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease;
}
.reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

/* ABOUT */
#about { background: transparent; }

.about-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 3rem; align-items: start;
}

.about-text p {
  font-size: 1rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.8;
  font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.about-cards { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; }

.info-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  padding: 1.4rem 1.6rem;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(46,196,182,0.07);
  display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 1rem;
  transition: transform 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s;
}
.info-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 36px rgba(46,196,182,0.13);
}

.info-card-icon {
  width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 14px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 1.3rem; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.icon-mint   { background: var(--mint); }
.icon-peach  { background: var(--peach); }
.icon-lav    { background: var(--lavender); }

.info-card-label {
  font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 800;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  color: var(--teal); margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
}
.info-card-title { font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; color: var(--text); }
.info-card-sub   { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 500; }

/* EXPERIENCE */
#experience { background: transparent; }

.exp-grid { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; }

.exp-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  padding: 2rem 2.5rem;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
  transition: transform 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s;
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;
}
.exp-card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0;
  width: 5px; height: 100%;
  border-radius: 4px 0 0 4px;
}
.exp-card.card-teal::before  { background: var(--teal); }
.exp-card.card-peach::before { background: #ff8c61; }

.exp-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-5px);
  box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(46,196,182,0.12);
}

.exp-header {
  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start;
  margin-bottom: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem;
}
.exp-title { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); }
.exp-date {
  background: var(--mint); color: var(--teal-dark);
  padding: 0.3rem 0.9rem; border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
  font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 800;
}
.exp-company { font-size: 0.92rem; color: var(--teal); font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 1rem; }

.exp-list { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.45rem; }
.exp-list li {
  font-size: 0.93rem; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 500;
  padding-left: 1.4rem; position: relative; line-height: 1.6;
}
.exp-list li::before {
  content: '✦';
  position: absolute; left: 0;
  color: var(--teal); font-size: 0.6rem; top: 4px;
}

.vol-badge {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.3rem;
  background: var(--lavender); color: #5a3e9a;
  padding: 0.2rem 0.7rem; border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
  font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 800;
  margin-left: 0.6rem; vertical-align: middle;
}

/* SKILLS */
#skills { background: transparent; }

.skills-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.25rem;
}

.skill-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  padding: 2rem 1.75rem;
  text-align: center;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
  transition: transform 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s;
}
.skill-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-6px) rotate(-1deg);
  box-shadow: 0 16px 40px rgba(46,196,182,0.15);
}

.skill-emoji {
  font-size: 2.2rem; margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
  display: block;
  animation: wiggle 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.skill-card:nth-child(2) .skill-emoji { animation-delay: -0.4s; }
.skill-card:nth-child(3) .skill-emoji { animation-delay: -0.8s; }
.skill-card:nth-child(4) .skill-emoji { animation-delay: -1.2s; }
.skill-card:nth-child(5) .skill-emoji { animation-delay: -1.6s; }
.skill-card:nth-child(6) .skill-emoji { animation-delay: -2s; }

@keyframes wiggle {
  0%,90%,100% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  93% { transform: rotate(-8deg); }
  96% { transform: rotate(8deg); }
}

.skill-card h4 {
  font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
  font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}
.skill-card p {
  font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.55;
}

/* CONTACT */
#contact { background: transparent; }

.contact-wrap {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  padding: 4rem;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 48px rgba(46,196,182,0.1);
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 4rem; align-items: center;
}

.contact-heading {
  font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 2.8rem);
  font-weight: 600; color: var(--text);
  line-height: 1.15; margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.contact-heading em { font-style: italic; color: var(--teal); }
.contact-sub { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.7; }

.contact-items { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; }

.contact-link {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem;
  background: white; border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  padding: 1.1rem 1.4rem;
  text-decoration: none; color: inherit;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--border, #eef5f4);
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
}
.contact-link:hover {
  transform: translateX(6px);
  border-color: var(--teal);
  box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(46,196,182,0.15);
}

.contact-icon-wrap {
  width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 14px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 1.2rem; flex-shrink: 0;
}

.contact-link-label { font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: var(--teal); }
.contact-link-val   { font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); }

/* FOOTER */
footer {
  text-align: center; padding: 2.5rem;
  font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 600;
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
}
footer span { color: var(--teal); }

/* Responsive */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .hero-wrap { flex-direction: column; gap: 3rem; text-align: center; }
  .hero-chips { justify-content: center; }
  .about-grid, .contact-wrap { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2rem; }
  .skills-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  .nav-links { display: none; }
  .contact-wrap { padding: 2rem; }
  .badge-1, .badge-2 { display: none; }
}
@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .skills-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="cursor"></div>
<div class="cursor-ring"></div>

<!-- Background blobs -->
<div class="blob blob-1"></div>
<div class="blob blob-2"></div>
<div class="blob blob-3"></div>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-pill">
    <span class="nav-logo">Dylan Paul</span>
    <ul class="nav-links">
      <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
      <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
      <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
      <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-wrap">
    <div class="hero-left">
      <div class="hero-tag reveal">✦ Open to Opportunities</div>
      <h1 class="hero-name reveal">
        Dylan
        <em>Paul.</em>
      </h1>
      <p class="hero-desc reveal">
        A motivated Rutgers student bringing organization, creativity, and real-world hustle to every opportunity.
      </p>
      <div class="hero-chips reveal">
        <span class="chip chip-mint">🎓 Rutgers '29</span>
        <span class="chip chip-peach">📍 Clifton, NJ</span>
        <span class="chip chip-lav">🏅 Honor Roll</span>
        <span class="chip chip-sky">🤝 Team Player</span>
      </div>
      <a href="#contact" class="hero-btn reveal">
        <span>✉️</span> Say Hello
      </a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-right reveal">
      <div class="photo-frame">
        <div class="photo-blob"></div>
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Dylan Paul" class="photo-img"/>
      </div>
      <div class="photo-badge badge-1">🎓 Rutgers University</div>
      <div class="photo-badge badge-2">✨ Class of 2029</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-eyebrow reveal">About Me</p>
    <h2 class="section-heading reveal">A team player who <em>shows up.</em></h2>
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div class="about-text reveal">
        <p>I'm a flexible and adaptable individual who works well in teams and thrives in collaborative environments. Highly organized, responsible, and attentive — I bring strong decision-making skills and a positive attitude to everything I do.</p>
        <p>Creative, patient, honest, and cooperative. I'm passionate about gaining hands-on experience, contributing meaningfully, and growing toward my future goals one step at a time.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="about-cards">
        <div class="info-card reveal">
          <div class="info-card-icon icon-mint">🎓</div>
          <div>
            <div class="info-card-label">Current</div>
            <div class="info-card-title">Rutgers University</div>
            <div class="info-card-sub">Class of 2029 · Enrolled</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="info-card reveal">
          <div class="info-card-icon icon-peach">🏫</div>
          <div>
            <div class="info-card-label">Previous</div>
            <div class="info-card-title">Brooklyn High School of the Arts</div>
            <div class="info-card-sub">Graduated June 2025 · Honor Roll Every Year</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="info-card reveal">
          <div class="info-card-icon icon-lav">📍</div>
          <div>
            <div class="info-card-label">Based in</div>
            <div class="info-card-title">Clifton, New Jersey</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EXPERIENCE -->
<section id="experience">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-eyebrow reveal">Experience</p>
    <h2 class="section-heading reveal">Where I've <em>made an impact.</em></h2>
    <div class="exp-grid">
      <div class="exp-card card-teal reveal">
        <div class="exp-header">
          <div class="exp-title">Takeout / Delivery Handler</div>
          <div class="exp-date">2022 – 2024</div>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-company">🍕 Sony and Tony's Pizzeria</div>
        <ul class="exp-list">
          <li>Took customer orders in person and over the phone with accuracy and clear communication.</li>
          <li>Processed customer payments efficiently and reliably.</li>
          <li>Coordinated with kitchen staff to ensure orders were correct and delivered on time.</li>
          <li>Maintained strong customer service standards through high-volume rush periods.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-card card-peach reveal">
        <div class="exp-header">
          <div class="exp-title">Bus Worker <span class="vol-badge">✦ Volunteer</span></div>
          <div class="exp-date">2023 – 2024</div>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-company">⛪ People's Baptist Church, Clifton NJ</div>
        <ul class="exp-list">
          <li>Assisted with transportation services ensuring a safe and welcoming environment for all passengers.</li>
          <li>Led engaging activities — songs, games, and discussions — to build community connections.</li>
          <li>Supervised children, promoting good behavior and resolving conflicts with patience.</li>
          <li>Acted as a role model, fostering a culture of respect, kindness, and positivity.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SKILLS -->
<section id="skills">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-eyebrow reveal">Skills</p>
    <h2 class="section-heading reveal">What I <em>bring to the table.</em></h2>
    <div class="skills-grid">
      <div class="skill-card reveal">
        <span class="skill-emoji">🤝</span>
        <h4>Teamwork</h4>
        <p>Thrives in collaborative environments with diverse groups of people.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card reveal">
        <span class="skill-emoji">📋</span>
        <h4>Organization</h4>
        <p>Highly organized and responsible with strong attention to detail.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card reveal">
        <span class="skill-emoji">💡</span>
        <h4>Problem Solving</h4>
        <p>Creative and analytical approach to finding the right solutions.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card reveal">
        <span class="skill-emoji">🗣️</span>
        <h4>Communication</h4>
        <p>Clear and confident communicator, both in person and by phone.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card reveal">
        <span class="skill-emoji">🎯</span>
        <h4>Decision Making</h4>
        <p>Confident and attentive even in fast-paced, high-stakes moments.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card reveal">
        <span class="skill-emoji">🌱</span>
        <h4>Adaptability</h4>
        <p>Flexible and quick to learn, always bringing a positive attitude.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="contact-wrap reveal">
      <div>
        <p class="section-eyebrow">Contact</p>
        <h2 class="contact-heading">Let's <em>connect.</em></h2>
        <p class="contact-sub">Open to new opportunities, part-time work, and meaningful conversations. I'd love to hear from you!</p>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-items">
        <a href="tel:8623322035" class="contact-link">
          <div class="contact-icon-wrap icon-mint">📞</div>
          <div>
            <div class="contact-link-label">Phone</div>
            <div class="contact-link-val">862-332-2035</div>
          </div>
        </a>
        <a href="mailto:dylanp72511@gmail.com" class="contact-link">
          <div class="contact-icon-wrap icon-peach">✉️</div>
          <div>
            <div class="contact-link-label">Email</div>
            <div class="contact-link-val">dylanp72511@gmail.com</div>
          </div>
        </a>
        <div class="contact-link">
          <div class="contact-icon-wrap icon-lav">📍</div>
          <div>
            <div class="contact-link-label">Location</div>
            <div class="contact-link-val">Clifton, New Jersey</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <p>Made with <span>♥</span> · Dylan Paul · 2025</p>
</footer>

<script>
// Cursor
const cursor = document.querySelector('.cursor');
const ring = document.querySelector('.cursor-ring');
document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
  cursor.style.left = e.clientX + 'px';
  cursor.style.top  = e.clientY + 'px';
  setTimeout(() => {
    ring.style.left = e.clientX + 'px';
    ring.style.top  = e.clientY + 'px';
  }, 60);
});
document.querySelectorAll('a, button').forEach(el => {
  el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
    cursor.style.transform = 'translate(-50%,-50%) scale(2)';
    cursor.style.background = '#ffd6c0';
  });
  el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
    cursor.style.transform = 'translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1)';
    cursor.style.background = 'var(--teal)';
  });
});

// Reveal on scroll
const obs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(entry => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      const siblings = Array.from(entry.target.parentElement.querySelectorAll('.reveal'));
      const i = siblings.indexOf(entry.target);
      entry.target.style.transitionDelay = i * 90 + 'ms';
      entry.target.classList.add('visible');
      obs.unobserve(entry.target);
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.1, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => obs.observe(el));

// Nav scroll
const nav = document.querySelector('nav');
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  nav.style.opacity = window.scrollY > 20 ? '1' : '1';
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
